name: Red Soldier Ant
description: A reliable early soldier ant that guards the park's red anthills. In groups, it is still one of the first serious roadblocks in the game and a good lesson in respecting close-range combat.
behavior: It patrols entrances, tunnels, and the ground around red anthills as a natural escort for the workers. It does nothing especially fancy, but it reacts quickly and fills the role of a constant guard extremely well.
interactionWithPlayer: It is aggressive toward the player unless you are riding a Red Soldier Ant Buggy. The moment you push too far into its territory or meddle with the eggs, it makes it very clear that the colony bites first and asks questions later.
interactionWithCreatures: It protects red workers and picks fights with anything that pushes too close to the anthill. In contested areas it also ends up clashing with cockroaches, spiders, and invading black ants.
strategy: A lone one falls to almost any early weapon, but groups demand more respect than they first seem to deserve. Block cleanly, do not get boxed in, and kill the soldiers that are cutting off your retreat first.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 30. 3-Combo Bite: 25. Charged Bite: 55. Stunning Bite: 30.

abilities.name: 3-Combo Bite
abilities.description: It chains together three blockable bites with little downtime.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: It delays briefly before landing a stronger bite.

abilities.name: Stunning Bite
abilities.description: It tilts its head and delivers a bite that breaks guard if you do not perfect block.

abilities.name: Blocking Stance
abilities.description: It rises on its hind legs and protects the front of its body from light attacks.
